candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; clearly labeled as total revenue and matches definition of REVT.
Cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Cost of sales total, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Revenue less direct cost of sales
candidates.why: Represents gross profit (revenue minus COGS), not total revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income/loss from investments in associates and joint ventures
candidates.why: Non-operating income from investments, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income/ (loss) for the period
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Special non-recurring items, not revenue.
Best match for COGS as direct cost of sales corresponding to revenue.

candidates.row_label: Revenue less direct cost of sales
candidates.why: This is gross profit, not a cost line; should not be used for COGS.
Overhead/operating expenses, more appropriate for SG&A than COGS.
Capitalized R&D, not core COGS.
General operating expenses; may include SG&A but not strictly COGS.
SG&A, not COGS.
Other operating/SG&A-type costs, not strictly COGS.
Overhead rental expense, not direct COGS.
Net operating result, not a pure cost line.
Financial expenses, not COGS.
R&D expense, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related grants, not COGS.
Supplemental rental overhead, not direct COGS.
Legal expenses/provisions, not COGS.
Special items, not recurring COGS.
Personnel expenses are a core SG&A component (overhead).
Other operating expenses typically include SG&A-type overhead.
Explicit SG&A line; even if preview values are nan, it should be included as a primary SG&A bucket.

variables.notes: There are duplicate row labels for 'Personnel Expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses' across years, but per instructions the label is included only once in final_choice; downstream logic can handle multiple rows with the same label.

candidates.why: Represents capitalized R&D; relevant but secondary to expensed R&D.
Core expensed R&D line; best primary choice for R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental
candidates.why: Grants related to R&D; can act as an adjustment to R&D expense but is not the main expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Government Grants - Supplemental

candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; a component of interest expense but smaller than total interest line.
Main interest expense line; best primary measure of interest cost.
Represents profit attributable to NCI, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail on lease interest; secondary choice after main interest expense lines.
Equity component, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of Elmera Group ASA
candidates.why: Income attributable to equity holders, not a balance sheet equity stock value.
Component of equity attributable to owners but not the total; better to use the total owner equity line.
Sum of Share Capital, Share Premium, and Other equity; represents equity attributable to owners (excludes non-controlling interests). Best match for BE.
Includes non-controlling interests (matches Total equity + NCI); using it would double-count with MIB.
Balancing/technical row, not needed when clear total equity is available.
Balancing row, not the substantive equity line.
Balance sheet total, not equity alone.

variables.notes: 'Total equity' equals Share Capital + Share Premium + Other equity and excludes Non-controlling interests, which are presented separately; this aligns with equity attributable to owners for BE.

candidates.why: Income attributable to non-controlling interests (flow), not the balance sheet stock, but confirms presence of NCI.
Primary balance sheet line for minority interests; best match for MIB.
Alternative label for the same NCI balance; good secondary option.
Income statement total for minority interest (flow), not stock.

variables.notes: Balance sheet NCI lines are used to represent the minority interest stock for MIB; income statement NCI lines are flows and therefore not selected.
